requirement_topic.en: MASM / MNS / GOST / IEC 62109 Safety Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: MASM / MNS / GOST / IEC 62109光伏逆变器安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: MASM / MNS / GOST / IEC 62109光伏逆變器安全證據

summary.en: Mongolia's standards and conformity route should be checked through the Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology for the exact inverter model, HS code, voltage class, and import or project route. MNS national standards may reflect Mongolian, GOST, or IEC-influenced requirements. For PV inverters, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the internationally recognized safety baseline for power converters used in photovoltaic systems and are commonly requested by international lenders, EPCs, owners, and technical advisers even where the final Mongolian route is framed as MNS or GOST adoption.
summary.zh: 蒙古标准和合格评定路径应通过蒙古标准化与计量局按准确逆变器型号、HS编码、电压等级以及进口或项目路径进行核查。MNS国家标准可能体现蒙古、GOST或IEC影响的要求。对于光伏逆变器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏系统用功率变换器的国际通用安全基准，即使最终蒙古路径表述为MNS或GOST采纳，国际融资方、EPC、业主和技术顾问也通常会要求该证据。
summary.zht: 蒙古標準和合格評定路徑應通過蒙古標準化與計量局按準確逆變器型號、HS編碼、電壓等級以及進口或項目路徑進行核查。MNS國家標準可能體現蒙古、GOST或IEC影響的要求。對於光伏逆變器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏系統用功率轉換器的國際通用安全基準，即使最終蒙古路徑表述為MNS或GOST採納，國際融資方、EPC、業主和技術顧問也通常會要求該證據。

standards_or_laws: MASM conformity assessment and MNS standards route for the exact product scope
MNS, GOST, or IEC standards where adopted, referenced, or required by tender or project owner
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters

summary.en: China-origin files may include GB/T 37408 safety clauses, NB/T 32004 reports, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, Chinese factory inspection documents, and sometimes IEC 62109 CB certificates. China-only GB/T or voluntary certification evidence should not be treated as a MASM conformity decision or as proof that a Mongolian MNS/GOST/IEC route has been satisfied.
summary.zh: 中国产文件可能包括GB/T 37408安全条款、NB/T 32004报告、CQC或CGC自愿证书、中国工厂检查文件，有时还包括IEC 62109 CB证书。仅中国GB/T或自愿认证证据不应被视为MASM合格评定决定，也不应被视为已满足蒙古MNS/GOST/IEC路径的证明。
summary.zht: 中國產文件可能包括GB/T 37408安全條款、NB/T 32004報告、CQC或CGC自願證書、中國工廠檢查文件，有時還包括IEC 62109 CB證書。僅中國GB/T或自願認證證據不應被視為MASM合格評定決定，也不應被視為已滿足蒙古MNS/GOST/IEC路徑的證明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 CB Scheme reports where available

gap.en: Gap: confirm whether the inverter is a regulated electrical product for MASM conformity and which MNS, GOST, or IEC standards apply. Prepare a safety evidence pack with IEC 62109-1/-2 reports or CB certificates where available, a model-family and critical-component list, nameplate and manual samples, Mongolian or required-language labeling plan, factory details, cold-climate operating limits, and a clause crosswalk from China GB/T evidence to the Mongolian route.
gap.zh: 差距：应确认该逆变器是否属于MASM合格评定范围内的受监管电气产品，以及适用哪些MNS、GOST或IEC标准。应准备安全证据包，包括可取得的IEC 62109-1/-2报告或CB证书、型号系列和关键零部件清单、铭牌和说明书样件、蒙古语或所需语言标签计划、工厂信息、寒冷气候运行限制，以及从中国GB/T证据到蒙古路径的条款对照。
gap.zht: 差距：應確認該逆變器是否屬於MASM合格評定範圍內的受監管電氣產品，以及適用哪些MNS、GOST或IEC標準。應準備安全證據包，包括可取得的IEC 62109-1/-2報告或CB證書、型號系列和關鍵零部件清單、銘牌和說明書樣件、蒙古語或所需語言標籤計畫、工廠資訊、寒冷氣候運行限制，以及從中國GB/T證據到蒙古路徑的條款對照。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where MASM conformity, MNS adoption, Mongolian technical regulation, customs practice, tender, lender, owner, insurer, or grid-connection approval requires the cited safety evidence; otherwise a product-scope due-diligence item
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC, or CGC evidence supports China domestic or voluntary routes and is not automatically accepted as MASM or Mongolia project safety approval

source.publisher: Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology (MASM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm MASM conformity scope and MNS/GOST/IEC applicability before relying on China safety files. IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence is usually the strongest export safety baseline, but it still needs model-scope, factory, labeling, cold-climate, and project-route review for Mongolia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在依赖中国安全文件前，应确认MASM合格评定范围及MNS/GOST/IEC适用性。IEC 62109-1/-2证据通常是最强的出口安全基准，但仍需针对蒙古审查型号范围、工厂、标签、寒冷气候及项目路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在依賴中國安全文件前，應確認MASM合格評定範圍及MNS/GOST/IEC適用性。IEC 62109-1/-2證據通常是最強的出口安全基準，但仍需針對蒙古審查型號範圍、工廠、標籤、寒冷氣候及項目路徑。
